narrative.description: Fortnite Battle Royale combines last-player-standing shooting with on-the-fly building of ramps, walls, and cover across a shrinking island map.
narrative.core_loop: Drop onto the island, loot weapons and materials, build structures during fights, outlast the storm circle, and eliminate opponents to win the match.

mechanics.map_notes: In Fortnite, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.
mechanics.expression: In Fortnite, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.

mechanics.map_notes: In Fortnite, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Fortnite, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In Fortnite, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.
mechanics.expression: In Fortnite, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: In Fortnite, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.
mechanics.expression: In Fortnite, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.

mechanics.map_notes: In Fortnite, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.
mechanics.expression: In Fortnite, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Fortnite through its core battle royale loop.
